name: Wheat Germ Crunch Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper baking cups or spray the bottoms with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, wheat germ, sugar, baking powder, and salt (if using). Mix well.
4. Add milk, melted margarine, and egg; mix until just combined.
5. Fill each muffin cup 2/3 full with batter. Sprinkle with additional wheat germ.
6. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Serve warm.
